title: 10 Pcs Sculpting Tools, Silicone Paint Brush, Modeling Clay Carving Tools Set, Silicone Paint Brush for Pottery Craft Pottery Craft, Rock, Nail, Blending, Drawing Art Projects
features: Material: The Sculpting Tools Tips Are Crafted from High-Quality Silicone, Featuring Soft Rubber Tips and an Aluminum Tube. The Sturdy Wooden Handle Is Designed to Resist Bending and Ensure Longevity.
Package Includes: 10 Pieces in Total. Includes 5 Pieces with a 2-Way Design, Providing a Total of 10 Unique DIY Polymer Clay Tools.
Features: Pottery Tools Are Lightweight and Easy to Handle, Making Them Comfortable for Extended Use. They Are Also Easy to Clean After Use.

All-Purpose Use: Clay Tools Are Ideal for Various Applications, Including Clay Work, Nail Art, Sculpture, Plasticizing, Fondant, and Cake Decorating. Particularly Suitable for Clay Sculpture and Handicraft Carving.
Ideal For: Artists, Crafters, and Hobbyists Looking to Elevate Their Projects with Precision and Ease.
description: Transform Your Creative Projects with Our Premium Sculpting Tools! Made from High-Quality Silicone and Equipped with Sturdy Wooden Handles, These Tools Are Designed for Longevity and Comfort. With 10 Unique Tips and a Lightweight Design, They Are Perfect for a Wide Range of Applications, from Clay Sculpture to Cake Decorating. Whether You're a Professional Artist or a Hobbyist, These Tools Will Help You Achieve Precision and Excellence in Every Project.
